code: import{getShadeVariants}from"./shadeUtils";/** Categories where admin may define customer-selectable shades (Makeup / Hair Color). */export function categoryAllowsOptions(cat){const c=String(cat||"").trim();return c==="Makeup"||c==="Hair Color";}/** True when the customer must pick exactly one shade/option before add-to-cart. */export function productRequiresOptionSelection(product){if(!product||!categoryAllowsOptions(product.cat||product.category))return false;return getShadeVariants(product).length>0;}
